overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along the Venice Beach-inspired promenade in Los Santos. The character passes colorful beachfront shops, palm trees, and other pedestrians on a sunny day with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with surf shops and arcades

events.description: passing a pedestrian standing near the shop entrance looking at phone

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade past the blue arcade building with surf shops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt standing near surfboard display looking at phone

entered.detail: distinctive bright blue building with white arches and columns housing beach shops
line of tall palm trees along the grassy beach area
large yellow signage for Canal Treats gifts and clothing store
colorful surfboards and bodyboards leaning against shop front

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sunny beachfront promenade with a distinctive blue arched building on the right housing surf shops and the Canal Treats store. Palm trees line the grassy beach area to the left while a few pedestrians stroll along the concrete walkway.

events.description: passing from blue arcade section to white awning restaurant area
pedestrians in opposing direction pass by closely on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade past the restaurant with white awning and planters

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking together in same direction as ego, passing by on the left

entered.detail: long building with white canvas awning and wicker planters along the facade
grassy area between the palm trees and the concrete promenade
large ferris wheel visible in the far distance near the pier

segments.scene_description: Moving past the white restaurant building with its distinctive awning and planters, the promenade continues with more pedestrians walking in opposing directions. The beach and palm trees remain on the left while a distant ferris wheel becomes visible near the pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with bollards and city view

events.description: approaching the intersection with the pizza restaurant on the corner
turning right and crossing the street with bollards

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, turning right, and crossing the street to the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: corner building with vertical red 'PIZZA' signage and green trim
tall downtown skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance
row of metal bollards separating the pedestrian area from the street
open street intersection with crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: Approaching the street intersection with the pizza restaurant on the corner, the camera turns right to cross the road. Bollards line the street edge while the city skyline becomes visible in the distance, and the palm trees now appear closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront commercial strip with ice cream and rental shops

events.description: passing the ice cream shop with purple awning and outdoor seating
beach sand becomes more visible on the left as buildings change to rental shops

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various beachfront shops including ice cream parlor and rental stores

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian standing near rental shop entrance

entered.detail: storefront with purple awning and vertical 'ICE CREAM' signage
beige building with 'FOR LEASE' signs and rental equipment displays
sandy beach area directly adjacent to the promenade on the left
wooden pier structure extending into the water in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite side of the street past the ice cream shop with its distinctive purple awning and various rental storefronts. The sandy beach is now clearly visible on the left with the distant pier, while pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the commercial strip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny beachfront promenade that gradually reveals the distant landmarks of the pier. It begins by gliding past a distinctive blue arched building housing surf shops and the Canal Treats store, with palm trees and grassy areas lining the left side of the concrete walkway. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts past a white restaurant building characterized by its awning and planters while pedestrians continue to stroll in opposing directions. The perspective then expands to reveal a distant ferris wheel appearing on the horizon, marking the transition toward the pier as the beach and palm trees remain constant companions on the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a busy street intersection toward a vibrant beachfront commercial strip. It begins by approaching a corner pizza restaurant, where the camera turns right to cross the road past a line of bollards as the distant city skyline emerges. As the camera moves forward, the palm trees on the left draw closer, shifting the perspective toward the coast. The scene then expands to reveal the sandy beach and a distant pier on the left while passing an ice cream shop with a purple awning and various rental storefronts. Finally, the view settles into a steady glide along the sidewalk, weaving through pedestrians walking in opposing directions along the sunny promenade.
